deviations.what: The Slider liveChange reproduces onSliderMoved server-side: Slider.value is two-way bound and the CSSGrid host Panel.width (bound to a model field) is recomputed as value + '%' on a backend round-trip. The original set Slider.value=100 statically and drove byId('gridLayout').setWidth imperatively; here value and width carry bindings to carry that behaviour.

The five core:HTML tiles carry raw HTML in the content attribute (the builder xml-escapes it, matching the original's escaped <header>/<aside>/<article>/<footer> content 1:1, including the original's quirks: the double space in '<aside  ...>Navigation</aside >' and the mismatched '<aside ...>Related Links</article>' close tag).
